name: key-value
description: A read-only two-column table of key -> value pairs, the detail-page primitive Filament's KeyValueEntry needs (a resolved map shown as a small ruled table inside an infolist). bordered (default true) adds card chrome; striped alternates a surface tint on even rows; emptyMessage renders a full-width cell when the map is empty. th headers carry scope='col' for a11y; no redundant role='table' (native implicit role). Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the key-value partial to your JTE root at lievit/key-value.jte, reached as @template.lievit.key-value(pairs=..., keyLabel=..., valueLabel=...). Pass an already-projected ordered Map<String,String> (the read side resolves it). bordered=false removes the card chrome. striped=true alternates even rows with a surface tint. emptyMessage shows a full-width cell when the map is empty. The source is yours: edit freely.
